Image.description: GPU-rendered Japanese MMO photo-mode game render, no HUD or nameplates, with a tasteful caption overlay

PaperbackCover.description: Hand-airbrushed gouache 1970s sci-fi paperback cover: muted palette, flat value masses, soft lost edges, print grain

PracticalMiniature.description: Pre-CGI late-70s practical motion-control miniature on anamorphic film: hard key, smoke-filled black, shallow focus

IntaglioVignette.description: Steel-plate banknote intaglio vignette in single dark ink, fading into bare cream paper with sparse burin line

Risograph.description: Two-color riso zine print: fluorescent pink-orange and blue spot inks, fine halftone screen, crisp misregistration

TrinitronCRT.description: Scene off a late-90s Trinitron CRT: fine scanlines, RGB phosphor stripes, bloom, deep black, glass curvature

DarkAirbrush.description: Silver-age sci-fi masked-airbrush illustration: crisp masked edges over smooth graded fills, moody low-key palette

SilverAgeAirbrush.description: 1950s three-ink masked-airbrush sci-fi cover on a heavily aged, foxed, creased paperback carrying the fine detail

AnimatedFamilyFilm.description: Late-80s/90s hand-drawn animation cel: flat ink-and-paint figures over lush gouache multiplane painted backgrounds

GildedVellum.description: Single gilded illumination on aged vellum: flat egg-tempera planes with burnished tooled gold-leaf sky and accents

Fresco.description: Buon-fresco wall painting on intact lime plaster: flat naive earth-pigment forms, chalky matte finish, faint craquelure

PenAndInk.description: Detailed black-and-white pen-and-ink crosshatched vignette plate from a deluxe illustrated edition, framed and captioned

PulpInk.description: Cheap 80s pulp-edition line vignette: bold thick contours degraded by coarse over-inked printing, generous bare paper

Storybook.description: Warm picture-book illustration: figure-first cross-hatch ink with soft wet-into-wet watercolor washes dissolving the distance

NurseryWatercolor.description: Vintage nursery spot illustration: a lone figure in living dip-pen line and faded washes floating on a wide white page

InkNoir.description: Bold brush-and-ink noir comic: stark chiaroscuro, heavy spotted blacks, varied brush line, one restrained spot accent

InkComicColor.description: Bold brush-and-ink comic with flat cel color: heavy spotted blacks, limited two-temperature palette, hard key light

NinetiesComic.description: Gritty late-90s CMYK comic scan: fine halftone rosette screen over dark-age ink, weathered faces, muddy muted palette

Adventure2000s.description: Clean flat 2000s point-and-click adventure art: vector-like cel-shaded shapes, hard flat tones, bright limited palette

Adventure90s.description: Early-90s Amiga adventure scene: 16-64 indexed colors, bold ordered dithering, chunky pixel grid, sprite over background

LandCamera.description: Low-key black-and-white Land-camera instant snapshot: harsh flash into depthless black, silver grain, thick white border

SurvivalHorror.description: Low-key flash photo, harsh on-camera flash falling to crushed black, grain and burned-in data strip — reads as AAA horror photo mode

Woodcut.description: Bold black-and-white woodcut broadsheet: solid black masses, coarse gouge-hatching, off-register inking, carved block caption

Blockbook.description: Hand-coloured medieval blockbook woodcut: carved black key-block with flat out-of-register medieval colour washes

Scratchboard.description: Black-and-white scratchboard: firm white lines scraped from a solid black ground, deep black dominates, hard single light

Tapestry.description: Photo of a real medieval wool tapestry on a black ground: bold flat stitched figures, visible weave, dyed-wool palette

Mosaic.description: Photo of a Byzantine mosaic: irregular tesserae ground plus glossy cloisonné-enamel figures with raised gold wires

Ukiyoe.description: Photo of an antique ukiyo-e woodblock print: flat colour blocks, black key-line, bokashi, woodgrain, mis-registration

NightVisionCam.description: Low-key infrared CCD security-camera still: IR cone into crushed black, sensor noise, fixed high-corner wide, time-only OSD

ThermalCam.description: Clean false-colour thermal/FLIR still in ironbow palette: heat as soft graded blobs, cold to black, thermal HUD readout

ThermalGrain.description: Degraded analog thermal feed: ironbow heat-blobs over heavy interlacing, crawling sensor grain, low-res smear, thermal HUD

BackupCam.description: Cheap car reversing-camera still: extreme fisheye, washed automotive colour, green/amber/red guideline overlay, dash UI bar

StreetCam.description: Municipal street-CCTV still: high wide vantage over wet night road, pooled sodium light into blue-black, soft feed, OSD

TrafficCam.description: Ugly low-quality DOT traffic-cam grab: heavy JPEG blocks, muddy desaturated colour, flat night road, location and time OSD

BodyCam.description: Police body-worn camera still: low first-person chest POV, fisheye, harsh LED into grainy dark, REC indicator, time OSD

DashCam.description: Forward-facing night dashcam still: hood edge across the bottom, headlight cone into dark, washed feed with bloom, OSD

DroneCam.description: Military UAV aerial surveillance still: steep top-down night-vision feed, small tracked subject, grainy mono, targeting HUD

LobbyCam.description: Cheap ancient lobby CCTV still: upscaled macro-pixel blocks, soft out-of-focus blur, fisheye, washed colour, crude time OSD

ConceptPoster.description: Cinematic concept-poster key art: a single striking graphic idea in a restrained palette, richly painterly, clean caption

Screenprint.description: Bold flat silkscreen poster: hard-edged single-colour shapes, no rendering, strict 3-4 ink palette, even screenprint grain

DigitalPainting.description: Polished painterly concept art: confident digital brushwork, harmonious limited palette, focal hierarchy, depth haze

ModernIllustration.description: Clean friendly contemporary illustration: soft cel-like shading, warm limited palette, calm background, subtle paper grain

AnimeIllustration.description: Polished modern anime illustration with crisp lineart, flat cel shading, and a softly painted atmospheric background

Gouache.description: Contemporary gouache illustration with opaque matte paint, visible brush and stipple texture, and a warm limited palette

GraphicNovel.description: Painted European bande-dessinée graphic-novel look with ink contours over rich atmospheric painted colour

CleanDigital.description: Clean modern digital illustration with disciplined swatch palette, big value shapes, and economical vector-like brushwork

ValueBlocked.description: Bold digital illustration designed around a few big interlocking light-and-shadow shapes for a strong notan value read

SwatchPalette.description: Clean digital illustration built from a strict coordinated colour-swatch set reused across big flat shapes

VectorBrush.description: Crisp digital illustration drawn with deliberate even-weight vector-like brush strokes and large clean shapes

LowPoly.description: Stylised low-poly 3D render with flat-shaded polygon facets, crisp edges, and a coordinated limited swatch palette

NeonSynthwave.description: Retro-future synthwave/cyberpunk look with saturated neon hues glowing against deep near-black and big silhouette shapes

Isometric.description: Tidy isometric diorama with the location as subject and a tiny figure, floating on a deep solid black field

CelAnimated.description: Modern high-budget cel-shaded animation frame: flat hard-edged toon shading over a lush separate painted background

CelMultiplane.description: Cel-shaded animated frame built as stacked flat transparent cel planes with depth from layering and atmospheric haze

Charcoal.description: Dramatic charcoal and graphite drawing on toned paper with smudged value masses and bright eraser-lifted highlights

ArtNouveau.description: Decorative Art Nouveau poster with sinuous linework, flat period pigments, ornament, and burnished gold-leaf borders

Watercolor.description: Loose luminous watercolour on cotton-rag paper with granulating transparent washes, wet blooms, and reserved-white highlights

InkWash.description: Sumi-e ink-wash on fibrous washi paper: graded black washes, decisive strokes, and large areas of bare paper as space

WesternRPG.description: Realistic gritty Western open-world RPG photo-mode screenshot with PBR materials and naturalistic global-illumination lighting

RetroPSX.description: Late-90s PlayStation-era 3D render with low-poly jitter, warping affine textures, dithering, and thick draw-distance fog

HeroShooter.description: Bright stylised hero-shooter photo-mode render with chunky PBR, shallow depth of field, and strong volumetric lighting

JRPGCinematic.description: Epic anime-flavoured JRPG cutscene render with cinematic depth of field, volumetric god-rays, and atmospheric distance

MobaStylized.description: Bright stylised MOBA hero splash art: a single champion filling the frame in a dynamic pose with glowing VFX and title lockup

MobaAnime.description: Anime hero splash art: clean cel-and-painted lineart, dynamic heroic pose, glowing VFX, bold name title lockup

BakedAAA.description: Mid-2000s AAA game screenshot with baked lightmap GI, DXT textures, faceted geometry and warm early-HDR bloom

DX9Interior.description: 2004 DirectX 9 game screenshot: hard stencil-volume shadows, normal-mapped speculars, DXT blocking, early-HDR bloom

RetroDX9.description: Unmistakably-period 2004 PC game render: visibly low-poly, low-res blocky textures, hard penumbra-less shadows, no GI

MidGenConsole.description: 2007 Xbox-360/PS3 game render: waxy pre-PBR speculars, bloom-drunk HDR, crude SSAO halos, brown/teal grade, jaggies

DeferredDX11.description: 2011 DirectX 11 game render: deferred shading, overdone SSAO, FXAA smear, pre-PBR gloss, teal-and-orange grade

RayTracedAAA.description: 2019 flagship AAA game render: full PBR, hybrid ray-traced reflections and GI, TAA, volumetrics, photogrammetry detail

FirstPerson.description: First-person immersive-sim/survival-horror render: own gloved hands and gear in frame, diegetic-only HUD, filmic grade

FixedCamHorror.description: Fixed-camera survival-horror render: single static canted dramatic angle, character dwarfed and vulnerable, crushed blacks

CinematicFilm.description: Prestige 35mm anamorphic film still: gentle horizontal flares, shallow DoF, grain, teal/warm grade, letterbox title

CinematicFlare.description: Blockbuster 35mm anamorphic film still: prominent blue-streak lens flares, stacked halos, veiling glare, letterbox title

NoirCinema.description: Black-and-white film-noir still: hard-key chiaroscuro, inky blacks, slatted light and smoke, grain, low dramatic angle

DocumentaryPhoto.description: Candid photojournalistic DSLR still: available light, handheld imperfection, muted true-to-life colour, high-ISO grain

PainterlyGame.description: Hand-painted stylised game render: visible brushwork in textures, characterful proportions, warm palette, wide 20mm lens

Velvia.description: Fujichrome Velvia slide film: intense saturation, glowing greens and punchy reds, high contrast, fine grain, chrome glow

Kodachrome.description: Kodachrome archival slide film: luminous warm reds and earth tones, high microcontrast, fine grain, golden cast

Portra.description: Kodak Portra 400 negative film: gentle natural skin tones, low contrast, creamy highlights, warm muted pastel palette

TriX.description: Kodak Tri-X 400 B&W reportage film: gritty visible grain, rich tonal range, punchy contrast, raw documentary feel

Ektachrome.description: Kodak Ektachrome E100 slide film: clean neutral-to-cool rendition, accurate saturation, bright blues, sharp clarity

CineStill.description: CineStill 800T tungsten night film: cyan shadows, teal midtones, amber highlights, trademark red-orange halation glow

Technicolor.description: Three-strip Technicolor motion picture: vivid saturated pure primaries, glamour lighting, hyper-real glossy glow

TealOrange.description: Modern blockbuster frame with the teal-and-orange grade: cool teal shadows, warm orange skin, glossy digital sheen

SpaghettiWestern.description: Classic spaghetti-western frame: sun-bleached ochre palette, harsh desert glare, extreme telephoto compression, grit

SilentFilm.description: Early-1920s silent-film frame: high-contrast ortho black-and-white, iris vignette, film damage, ornate intertitle caption

BleachBypass.description: Gritty bleach-bypass war/thriller frame: desaturated near-monochrome, crushed blacks, metallic sheen, heavy grain

Giallo.description: Italian giallo horror frame: bold unnatural red-and-blue gel lighting, hard theatrical shadows, stylised glamorous dread

CandlelitNatural.description: Film shot purely by natural candlelight: warm low-light glow, ultra-shallow focus, painterly old-master tableau, fine grain

Symmetrical.description: Rigorously symmetrical planimetric frame: dead-centered subject, mirror-balanced pastel set, flat front-on camera, deadpan

EightiesSciFi.description: 1980s sci-fi action frame: anamorphic flares, atmospheric haze, hard backlight, glowing neon practicals, 35mm grain

DayForNight.description: Day-for-night technique: deep cool-blue moonlit grade carrying daylight tells like too-crisp shadows and a sun-as-moon

DiffusionGlamour.description: Heavy diffusion soft-focus glamour: blooming halated highlights, gauzy romantic glow, lifted milky blacks, pearlescent palette

LargeFormat70.description: Large-format 65/70mm epic frame: extraordinary clarity, deep front-to-back focus, near-grainless tonality, monumental scale

CrossProcess.description: Cross-processed film: wildly shifted colour with cyan-green shadows and acid highlights, boosted contrast, lurid analog look

Infrared.description: Colour infrared Aerochrome film: foliage rendered surreal reds and pinks, cyan skies, dreamlike false colour, halation glow

Super8.description: Super-8 home-movie frame: heavy grain, warm faded colour, corner vignette, gate-weave jitter, dust and orange light leaks

VHS.description: Degraded VHS videotape frame: scanlines, chroma bleed, tracking distortion, washed noisy colour, camcorder OSD timestamp

Chiaroscuro.description: Single-source low-key chiaroscuro: deep black swallowing the frame, one hard amber pool on the subject, operatic dread

Autochrome.description: Earliest-colour Autochrome plate (1907): dreamy muted low-contrast colour with delicate pointillist starch-grain stipple

HandTinted.description: Hand-tinted early photo: soft black-and-white or sepia base with delicate brushed-on pastel washes that escape the lines

DyeTransfer.description: Dye-transfer imbibition Technicolor print: lush velvety ultra-saturated colour, dense blacks, near-grainless, glamorous

Agfacolor.description: Early Agfacolor European stock: warm-but-muted earthy ambers, dusty reds and olive, low saturation, faded continental feel

Sovcolor.description: Sovcolor Eastern-bloc stock: cool muted sickly desaturated greens and anaemic blues, flat grey institutional melancholy

Anscochrome.description: 1950s Anscochrome slide film: warm off-balance magenta-shifting colour, gently faded low-contrast mid-century album feel

TwoStripTechnicolor.description: Early two-strip Technicolor: limited red-orange and cyan-green palette with no true blue, chalky pastel flesh, two-tone charm
